economic_notes: Member of Ma-Mook Development Corporation (forestry, 5-nation organization). 20% investment in Mamook Natural Resources Ltd. Roads and drainage improvements at Marktosis I.R. No. 15 contract totaling $6,295,815.
notes: Audit is QUALIFIED for two reasons: (1) Asset Retirement Obligations (PS 3280) not identified by Nation — auditor unable to determine impact on liabilities, net financial assets, TCA, accumulated surplus; (2) Budget not formally approved by Council and therefore not presented in financial statements as required by PSAS. Prior year figures restated (Note 22) due to prior period adjustment of $2,479,571. Loss on disposal of capital asset of $235,488 recorded. Nation adopted PS 3400 Revenue prospectively April 1, 2023. Five entities fully consolidated: Ahousaht Education Authority, 1139763 B.C. Ltd., Cha Chum Hi Yup Tiic Miss Society, Chimahnah Healing Centre Ltd., 1309520 B.C. Ltd. One GBE (Mamook Natural Resources Ltd 20%) accounted for by modified equity method at cost of $1. Ma-Mook Development Corporation (5-nation forestry org) not consolidated. Total government transfers calculated as ISC + NTC + FNSA + BC + Aboriginal Headstart + CMHC + FNHA + DFO = 14,708,073 + 5,763,054 + 1,600,525 + 1,555,257 + 378,824 + 206,592 + 82,054 + 155,066 = 24,449,445; OSR = revenue minus government transfers.
warnings: Qualified audit opinion issued — financial statements may not fully reflect true position
